Package ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.definition.expression

package ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.definition.expression
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.definition
     
  • Interfaces
    Class
    Description
    DRIComplexExpression<T>
    A complex implementation of an expression.
    The difference between a simple and complex expression is that a complex expression allows registering additional fields or variables that are not defined in the report and are needed for calculating the value.
    DRIExpression<T>
    Expressions are used to define various calculations, conditions, text field content, specific report groups, etc.
    DRIJasperExpression<T>
    This expression allows declaring an expression in a Jasper native syntax.
    DRIParameterExpression
    DRIParameterExpression interface.
    DRIPropertyExpression
    DRIPropertyExpression interface.
    DRISimpleExpression<T>
    The basic and the simplest implementation of an expression.
    DRISystemExpression<T>
    DRISystemExpression interface.
    DRIValueFormatter<T,U>
    The purpose of this expression is to format a value only.
    For instance, when it is necessary to display a currency next to the value or just show a value in another format.
    It can be applied in any report column, group, subtotal, or text field component.
